steps.title: Warm-up — Recall Yesterday
steps.description: Spend 5 minutes thinking of 5 sentences you'd say in Hindi using 'want'. Then convert each to 'would like to' in English. This activates your brain for today's topic.

steps.title: Read Today's Lessons
steps.description: Go through all 8 lesson sections on 'Would Like To'. Pay special attention to the formula, negative form, question form, and common mistakes sections.

steps.title: Vocabulary Power Hour
steps.description: Go through today's 100+ vocabulary words. Focus especially on professional verbs (request, arrange, schedule, discuss, confirm) and learn their 6 sentence contexts.

steps.title: Practice Questions Sprint
steps.description: Attempt at least 30 of today's 100 practice questions. Translate Hindi to English mentally before writing. Check your answers and note mistakes.

steps.title: Speaking Drill — Speak Aloud
steps.description: Pick any 3 speaking drill sets and say each sentence aloud 3 times. Focus on using the contraction 'I'd like to' naturally. Record yourself if possible.
